rationale: Gov't Code §2306.067 governs loaned employees between the department and other governmental entities. It has no bearing on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption appraisal thresholds.
quote: Sec. 2306.067. LOANED EMPLOYEES. (a) The director may enter into reciprocal agreements with a state agency or instrumentality or local government to loan or assign department employees to that entity.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
